title: scutellaria lutilabia
intro: Scutellaria lutilabia, also known as the Chinese skullcap, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria lutilabia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Scutellaria lutilabia is often prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
